name: Arq. Sofia Sistemas
role: Projeta a arquitetura da plataforma TokenOps. Define padroes de AI Gateway proxy e roteamento LLM. Decisoes sobre escalabilidade e estrategia dual-database (PostgreSQL + ClickHouse). Participa de todas as fases.

name: TL Rafael Review
role: Coordena tecnicamente o time. Define padroes NestJS/Next.js. Conduz code reviews. Planeja sprints focados no MVP (Gateway + Dashboard + Estimation + Recommendation).

name: BA Clara Requisitos
role: Engenharia de requisitos dos 6 modulos TokenOps (Gateway/Estimator/Recommendation/Optimization/Remediation/Dashboard) + 2 plugins (Chrome/VS Code). User stories e criterios de aceite.

name: Dev Bruno Backend
role: Implementa APIs NestJS — AI Gateway proxy e Token Estimator e Model Recommendation Engine e Prompt Optimization e Remediation Engine. PostgreSQL/ClickHouse/Redis.

name: Dev Fernanda Front
role: Implementa dashboard Next.js/React/Tailwind — Dashboard de Governanca e Token Estimator UI e Prompt Analyzer e Cost Explorer e Model Recommendation UI.

name: QA Quesia Quality
role: Testes para proxy/gateway e estimacao de tokens e recomendacao de modelos e otimizacao de prompts. Unit/integration/e2e/performance.

name: TW Daniela Docs
role: Documenta APIs do TokenOps — Gateway API e SDK e runbooks e ADRs. Guias de integracao para 7 provedores LLM. Docs de plugins Chrome/VS Code.

name: PM Pedro Progress
role: Relatorios de status do TokenOps. Acompanha progresso MVP e roadmap V2/V3. Riscos e bloqueios. Updates para stakeholders.
